semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for the prompt-context infrastructure module's budget and diagnostic functions.
responsibilities: Verifies that calculateSourcePromptBudgets correctly allocates stricter validation budgets based on content length and skeleton size.
Verifies that buildDependencySelectionDiagnostics produces diagnostics with retained and truncated dependency candidates matching budget limits.
Implicitly validates buildRuleBlockDiagnostics (likely tested in the same suite).
Isolates prompt-context budget and diagnostic logic for regression detection.
outOfScope: Production runtime behavior – this file does not execute in production.
Real LLM API calls or network I/O.
File system operations or database access.
invariants: All tests must be written using the vitest framework (describe, expect, it).
The test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts to be discovered by the test runner.
No circular imports are introduced by this file.
Mock implementations may be used in place of real dependencies.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish regression-safe unit tests for the core budget and diagnostic algorithms used by the prompt-context pipeline, enabling refactoring without behavioral breakage.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No changes specific to this test file are indicated by the git history; the broader commit 'chore: apply release gate fixes and sync accumulated source changes' suggests stabilization across the codebase.
